'''Kraven''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who served as [[Commander/Legends|commander]] of the [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] [[Badlands (CR90 corvette)|''Badlands'']] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. In [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]], he was assigned to [[Corrupter Task Force]]<ref name="truedoggy">''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]''</ref> and later became an [[Admiral/Legends|admiral]]. Following the Emperor Palpatine's death at the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], the now Admiral Kraven became the self-styled [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Warlord/Legends|Warlord]] of a [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]] stellar cluster. He sent [[Klick (clone trooper)/Legends|Klick]], who he promoted to wing commander, with his squadrons of [[TIE/d "Defender" Multi-Role Starfighter/Legends|TIE Defenders]] to destroy the upstart [[Cronal|Shadowspawn]] on [[Mindor/Legends|Mindor]] However, Klick and his TIE Defenders would end up defecting to Shadowspawn's forces where he was promoted to [[Group Captain]] by the mad warlord.<ref name="ea">''[[Luke Skywalker and the Shadows of Mindor]]''</ref>

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]'' {{1st}}
